{{Quote|Fleeing vessel, this is the Warlord. You will slow to a halt immediately. You will prepare to receive boarders. If you do not immediately slow to a halt, we will fire for effect.|''Warlord''{{'s}} captain, to a rebel ship.|<ref name="ML" />}}
'''''Warlord''''' was a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] in service in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Warlord'' entered in service some years after the beginning of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ship was assigned to the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]] defense fleet.<ref name="ML" />

Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] began to develop a new [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] technology for the Empire, the [[NOVA]] project. At this time, the ''Warlord'' was often used by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Rodin Hlian Verpalion]], [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] of the project, as his personal ship.<ref name="ML" />

When a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] [[Mission to Lianna (Operation)|stole]] the NOVA plans on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]], the ''Warlord'' failed in catching their ship in the [[Lianna system/Legends|Lianna system]].<ref name="ML" />
